questionHtml: Hypoxia caused a 13 % increase in the surface area to volume ratio of the diaphragm. Suggest a reason for this change.
markschemeHtml:
a. decrease in volume/atrophy/loss of cells/less muscle fibres/less tissue in the diaphragm

b. SA to volume ratio increased to make oxygen uptake into muscle/cells faster

Do not accept reduction in area of diaphragm

[Max 1 Mark]

meta.title: Hypoxia caused a 13 % increase in the surface area to volume ratio of the diaphragm. Suggest a reason for this change.
